resources.string: Hartmann Wedding Booth needs access to your camera, microphone, and storage to capture and save photos and videos.
The wedding booth is ready for guests.
Scan to download your wedding photo
Start capturing to fill the wedding gallery
Open the Charles & Jessica wedding gallery.
Wedding debug tools are hidden in this private build.
This private booth is for **Charles & Jessica Hartmann\'s wedding** on **August 22, 2026**. Guests can take photos, scan the QR code, and download from the wedding gallery.
The app asks for **camera** access to take photos, **microphone** access for videos, and **media** access to save captures. Wedding photos are uploaded to the private gallery after capture.
Use **Start Wedding Booth** for the camera, **View Wedding Gallery** for finished photos, **Wedding Booth Settings** for setup, and **How It Works** to replay these instructions.
Position everyone in the live preview and tap the round **Capture** button. A three-second countdown plays, the app says Smile, flashes the screen, saves the photo, and prepares the QR code.
This private wedding booth is ready for Charles & Jessica\'s guests.
The **Wedding Gallery** stores captured photos, GIFs, and videos. Tap an item to preview it, download it, print it, or share it.
New captures upload automatically to the private Charles & Jessica wedding gallery.
After upload succeeds, the screen shows a **QR code** and the gallery password so guests can open and download their photo.
Settings control the event details, camera, video capture, booth mode, GIF mode, filters, templates, frames, watermark, SMS, and email.
This is a private wedding build. Captures are saved locally on this device and uploaded to the password-protected Charles & Jessica wedding gallery.
Open **Wedding Booth Settings** and tap **Open Wedding Gallery** to visit the online gallery.
